3102550.name: Keep Going
3102550.description:
This is my first commercial game ever. As a gamer who no longer has time to play long games, this genre seems like the perfect balance between playtime and fun! I hope you all like it. Follow me for my next games (my next game is a horror game)!!

Demo Features:

  • Survive for 5 minutes in a fast and chaotic match.

  • Collect experience from defeated monsters to unlock and choose from over 20 skills.

  • Fight 4 different types of enemies and some Glowing Elite enemies.

  • If you die, Keep Going!!

Complete Game Features:

  • 5 more types of enemies.

  • More types of guns.

  • Endless matches.

  • Over 40 upgrades.
3102550.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
